markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Ismael Changawa Ruwa Mzai wins the Antwi vs Mzai professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Africa Round after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Antwi vs Mzai professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Africa Round after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Ismael Changawa Ruwa Mzai win the Antwi vs Mzai: Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Africa Round match?
